capabilities.label: Zoom Out
capabilities.operatorUse: Run one bounded reframing pass before committing to a plan when work risks overfitting to one bug, agent, or workflow.
capabilities.partyModeUse: Use as a named reframing round for the problem, constraints, alternatives, and chosen path.
capabilities.boundary: Operator-invoked capability, not automatic background behavior.

capabilities.label: TDD
capabilities.operatorUse: Produce failing-test-first implementation guidance when implementation risk warrants it.
capabilities.partyModeUse: Use for implementation-ready test guidance when the round involves code, prompts, validators, or policy enforcement.
capabilities.boundary: Required for implementation-risk work, but not a mandate to turn every discussion into test ceremony.

capabilities.label: Ubiquitous Language
capabilities.operatorUse: Align terms across skills, docs, prompts, module help, and code-facing names when terminology drifts.
capabilities.partyModeUse: Use as a named term-alignment round across docs, prompts, module help, agents, and code-facing names.
capabilities.boundary: Use for terminology-sensitive work; do not create glossary ceremony for unrelated implementation chores.

capabilities.label: Grill Me
capabilities.operatorUse: Run an opt-in or checkpoint-only challenge round that records objections plus decisions changed or deferred.
capabilities.partyModeUse: Use as an opt-in challenge round, recommended at checkpoint boundaries or when confidence is low.
capabilities.boundary: Never default background behavior; use only when requested or when checkpoint risk justifies a visible challenge pass.
